input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.2
            TITLE: black flag - pull into the driver change area for discussion with the track officials.  a time

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.2: Black Flag - Pull into the Driver Change Area for discussion with the track officials.  A time
D.4.1.2 Black Flag - Pull into the Driver Change Area for discussion with the track officials.  A time 
penalty may be assessed.

final_answer: rule D.4.1.2: Black Flag - Pull into the Driver Change Area for discussion with the track officials. A time penalty may be assessed.
